import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from sklearn.preprocessing import MinMaxScaler
from sklearn.metrics import mean_squared_error, mean_absolute_error
from tensorflow.keras.models import Sequential
from tensorflow.keras.layers import LSTM, Dense

# === 1. Đọc dữ liệu ===
file_paths = {
    "Brent": "Brent_Crude_Oil_data.csv",
    "Crude": "Crude_Oil_data.csv",
    "Heating": "Heating_Oil_data.csv",
    "NaturalGas": "Natural_Gas_data.csv",
    "RBOB": "RBOB_Gasoline_data.csv"
}

dataframes = {}
for name, path in file_paths.items():
    df = pd.read_csv(path)
    df['date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['date'])
    df.set_index('date', inplace=True)
    df.sort_index(inplace=True)
    dataframes[name] = df

# === 2. Tiền xử lý & chuẩn hóa ===
scaled_dfs = {}
scalers = {}
list_num_cols = ['open', 'high', 'low', 'volume']

for name, df in dataframes.items():
    features = [col for col in list_num_cols if col in df.columns]
    df_selected = df[features].copy()

    scaler = MinMaxScaler()
    df_scaled_features = pd.DataFrame(scaler.fit_transform(df_selected), columns=features, index=df.index)

    target_scaler = MinMaxScaler()
    df_scaled_close = target_scaler.fit_transform(df[['close']])
    df_scaled_features['close'] = df_scaled_close

    scaled_dfs[name] = df_scaled_features
    scalers[name] = target_scaler

# === 3. Chia train/val/test ===
train_dfs, val_dfs, test_dfs = {}, {}, {}
for name, df in scaled_dfs.items():
    total_len = len(df)
    train_size = int(total_len * 0.7)
    val_size = int(total_len * 0.1)

    train_dfs[name] = df[:train_size]
    val_dfs[name] = df[train_size:train_size + val_size]
    test_dfs[name] = df[train_size + val_size:]

# === 4. Tạo chuỗi LSTM ===
def create_sequences(data, window):
    X, y = [], []
    for i in range(len(data) - window):
        X.append(data.iloc[i:i+window].values)
        y.append(data.iloc[i+window]['close'])
    return np.array(X), np.array(y)

window = 10
X_train_dict, y_train_dict = {}, {}
X_val_dict, y_val_dict = {}, {}
X_test_dict, y_test_dict = {}, {}

for name in scaled_dfs:
    X_train_dict[name], y_train_dict[name] = create_sequences(train_dfs[name], window)
    X_val_dict[name], y_val_dict[name] = create_sequences(val_dfs[name], window)
    X_test_dict[name], y_test_dict[name] = create_sequences(test_dfs[name], window)

# === 5. Khởi tạo và train mô hình ===
models = {}
for name in scaled_dfs:
    model = Sequential()
    model.add(LSTM(50, input_shape=(window, X_train_dict[name].shape[2])))
    model.add(Dense(1))
    model.compile(optimizer='adam', loss='mse')
    model.fit(
        X_train_dict[name], y_train_dict[name],
        validation_data=(X_val_dict[name], y_val_dict[name]),
        epochs=100, batch_size=16, verbose=0
    )
    models[name] = model

# === 6. Dự đoán và inverse ===
y_pred_dict, y_test_inv_dict = {}, {}
for name in scaled_dfs:
    model = models[name]
    y_pred_scaled = model.predict(X_test_dict[name]).flatten()
    y_test_scaled = y_test_dict[name].flatten()

    y_pred = scalers[name].inverse_transform(y_pred_scaled.reshape(-1, 1)).flatten()
    y_test = scalers[name].inverse_transform(y_test_scaled.reshape(-1, 1)).flatten()

    y_pred_dict[name] = y_pred
    y_test_inv_dict[name] = y_test

# === 7. Đánh giá trên giá trị gốc ===
metrics = {}
for name in y_pred_dict:
    y_test = y_test_inv_dict[name]
    y_pred = y_pred_dict[name]
    mse = mean_squared_error(y_test, y_pred)
    rmse = np.sqrt(mse)
    mae = mean_absolute_error(y_test, y_pred)
    mape = np.mean(np.abs((y_test - y_pred) / (y_test + 1e-6))) * 100

    metrics[name] = {
        "MSE": round(mse, 6),
        "RMSE": round(rmse, 6),
        "MAE": round(mae, 6),
        "MAPE (%)": round(mape, 6)
    }

print("\n🎯 ĐÁNH GIÁ LỖI TRÊN GIÁ GỐC:")
print(pd.DataFrame(metrics).T)

# === 8. Vẽ biểu đồ train / val / test / predict ===
for name in scaled_dfs:
    df = dataframes[name]
    original_close = df['close'].values
    n = len(original_close)

    train_size = int(n * 0.7)
    val_size = int(n * 0.1)
    test_start = train_size + val_size
    pred_start_index = test_start + window

    plt.figure(figsize=(16, 6))
    plt.plot(range(train_size), original_close[:train_size], label='Train', color='green')
    plt.plot(range(train_size, test_start), original_close[train_size:test_start], label='Validation', color='red')
    plt.plot(range(test_start, n), original_close[test_start:], label='Test (Thực tế)', color='blue')
    plt.plot(range(pred_start_index, pred_start_index + len(y_pred_dict[name])), y_pred_dict[name], label='Dự đoán LSTM', color='orange')
    plt.axvline(train_size, color='gray', linestyle='--', label='Train/Val Split')
    plt.axvline(test_start, color='black', linestyle='--', label='Val/Test Split')

    plt.title(f"LSTM Dự đoán giá close - {name}")
    plt.xlabel("Thời gian (ngày)")
    plt.ylabel("Giá close")
    plt.legend()
    plt.grid(True)
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()
